newProducts.title: adk-go
newProducts.description: Google's code-first Go toolkit for building AI agents with flexibility and control. Provides developers with tools to create autonomous AI agents using the Go programming language.

newProducts.title: LightRAG
newProducts.description: HKUDS retrieval-augmented generation tool featured at EMNLP2025. Advanced RAG system for improving AI agent capabilities with better information retrieval.

newProducts.title: Memori
newProducts.description: GibsonAI's open-source memory engine for LLMs and multi-agent systems. Enables AI agents to maintain persistent memory and context across sessions.

newProducts.title: call-center-ai
newProducts.description: Microsoft's API for AI-powered phone calls. Enables developers to build autonomous voice agents for customer service and call center operations.

whitelistUpdates.title: Cursor 2.1 Release
whitelistUpdates.description: Improved Plan Mode, AI Code Review in Editor, and Instant Grep functionality

whitelistUpdates.title: Enterprise Pricing and New Integrations
whitelistUpdates.description: GitHub Copilot Enterprise available at $39 per user/month, new GitHub Spark integration for Pro+ and Enterprise plans, and updated Free tier limits (2000 completions, 50 chat requests)

whitelistUpdates.title: CLI v1.5.14 Stable Release
whitelistUpdates.description: Stable CLI release with 113 commits from main branch, includes various bug fixes and improvements

whitelistUpdates.title: CLI v1.5.14 Beta Releases
whitelistUpdates.description: Multiple beta releases leading up to stable v1.5.14, released on November 19-21, 2024

whitelistUpdates.title: VS Code Extension v1.3.26
whitelistUpdates.description: VS Code extension update released alongside CLI v1.5.14

insights.title: Evolving GitHub Copilot's Next Edit Suggestions Through Custom Model Training
insights.description: GitHub's engineering team shares insights on improving Copilot's edit suggestion capabilities through specialized model training techniques. The post discusses how they're making the AI coding assistant smarter with more targeted tool usage.
insights.author: GitHub Engineering Team

insights.title: Making GitHub Copilot Smarter With Fewer Tools
insights.description: Technical deep-dive into how GitHub is optimizing Copilot's architecture to improve performance while reducing computational overhead. Focuses on efficiency improvements in AI-assisted coding.
insights.author: GitHub Engineering Team

insights.title: OpenAI Announces GPT-5.1 with Enhanced Capabilities
insights.description: OpenAI introduces GPT-5.1 featuring 'compaction' technology for handling long-context tasks more efficiently. The new model promises smarter, more conversational interactions including improved code generation.
insights.author: OpenAI

insights.title: Nano Banana Pro Image Generation Breakthrough
insights.description: Discussion of new image generation model described as 'astonishingly capable', representing advances in multimodal AI that could impact visual coding and UI generation tasks.
insights.author: Unknown
